name: Spaghetti alla Nerano
method: Peel and slice zucchini 1/8-inch, place in a colander and sprinkle 1 T salt. Let sit for 30 minutes. Rinse and dry zucchini well. You want the water removed so that the zucchini is crispy when fried. In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil, add zucchini a little at a time and brown on both sides. Set aside on paper towels. Boil pasta in salted water. In the meantime, in a large frying pan, add 1 T of olive oil and red pepper flakes. Add half of the zucchini and sauté for a few minutes, mashing the zucchini with your wooden spoon. Add seasonings, butter, and basil and with tongs remove the pasta when it's cooked and put it right on top of the zucchini. Add provolone cheese on top, 2-3 ladles of pasta water, and manticare well. Turn onto plates and put the extra zucchini on top with a sprinkling of parmesan and extra cracked black pepper. Serve with fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
